args.code:
import json, pandas as pd

biz = pd.DataFrame(var_call_eaw3WcD810VrL97wf7sjx2Hs)
rev = pd.DataFrame(var_call_XoMBprvyAr6nuo1IeOgoybbi)

# clean types
rev['avg_rating'] = rev['avg_rating'].astype(float)
rev['review_count'] = rev['review_count'].astype(int)

# keep only actual Los Angeles, CA (exclude La Jolla etc.)
mask = biz['description'].str.contains(r'Los Angeles,?\s*CA', case=False, regex=True, na=False)
biz_la = biz[mask].copy()

merged = biz_la.merge(rev, on='gmap_id', how='left')
merged = merged.dropna(subset=['avg_rating'])

# top 5 by avg_rating desc, tie-breaker by review_count desc then name
merged = merged.sort_values(['avg_rating','review_count','name'], ascending=[False, False, True]).head(5)

out = merged[['name','gmap_id','avg_rating','review_count']].to_dict(orient='records')
print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(out))
